description: Passenger counting sensors show a bus on a popular route is dangerously overcrowded. An operator must dispatch a supplementary bus.

nodes.task_description: Receive a 'Passenger Capacity Exceeded' alert for 'Bus 101' on 'Route 5'.
Find the nearest available, out-of-service bus from the depot.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies a spare bus ready for deployment.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch the spare bus to run the same route, starting a few stops ahead of the overcrowded bus, to alleviate the passenger load.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully dispatches the supplementary bus with a specific mission.
